sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25422" key="*dia/nusos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Διάνυσος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">διαίνω</etym>) coined as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Διόνυσος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
